input.background: Identify whether the studies described here are based on single samples, paired samples, or independent samples.
input.question: An investigator compares vaccination histories in 30 autistic schoolchildren to an SRS of nonautistic children from the same school district.

autistic_children_vaccination_history.description: Vaccination histories of autistic schoolchildren being studied.

nonautistic_children_vaccination_history.value: Vaccination histories of a simple random sample (SRS) of nonautistic children from the same school district
nonautistic_children_vaccination_history.description: Vaccination histories of nonautistic children being compared to the autistic group.
